subcodes.first_line: The rays of the Day-star of the world have illumined every land—blessed are they that have beheld!
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اشرق الافاق من انوار نیر الاشراق طوبی للفائزین قد ارتفع الندآء من الشجره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
